leaks.title: Manual Data Entry Bottleneck
leaks.description: Your team suffers from the 'Manual Entry Tax'. Over 10 hours a week are wasted manually porting leads from forms to a scattered CRM.

leaks.title: Rented Infrastructure Dependency
leaks.description: You are exposed to six-figure SaaS 'app tax' increases. It is time to graduate to Sovereign Infrastructure.

leaks.title: Broken Perimeter Signals
leaks.description: Inconsistent 'Information Fusion' across your 5 primary social profiles hurts buyer conviction before they arrive at your gateway.

leaks.title: Missing Governance
leaks.description: High 'Frankenstein Index'. You have overlapping SaaS tools creating data silos rather than a Managed Nervous System (MNS).

leaks.title: No Unified Commercial Engine
leaks.description: Lack of real-time buyer behavior perception (Clarity/SA) is obscuring drop-off points in your pricing tier page.
